phase: Phase 3 — tiered model selection (LSTM → XGBoost → rules)
files_changed: backend/app/lib/model.py (load_best() now evaluates tier gates; new selected_tier() and tier_diagnostics(); reload() resets all globals)
backend/app/api/main.py (health endpoint stays compatible with rules tier)
backend/tests/test_phase1_fallback.py (test_no_fallback_when_predict_succeeds updated for Phase 3 tier semantics)

current_selection.selection_reason: no ML bundle qualified its tier gate

live_forecast_after_phase3.model_version: rules-fallback-v1 (rule_based: no ML bundle qualified its tier gate)

bug_found_during_phase_3.issue: global _lstm_rejection_reason, _xgb_rejection_reason were missing from the global declaration in load_best(). Python created local variables instead of mutating the module globals, so tier_diagnostics() always returned 'qualified' even after a rejection.
bug_found_during_phase_3.fix: Added the missing globals to the global declaration. Now tier_diagnostics() correctly surfaces per-tier rejection reasons.

next_phase: Phase 5 — Richer label schema (no_go_reason + confidence on operator verifications)
